Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal

Class Rationale

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal.Rationale
Direct Known Subclasses:
Rationale.Composition, Rationale.EqualToSubset, Rationale.Hypothesis, Rationale.LastOverride, Rationale.Projection, Rationale.RelationToCartesian, Rationale.SetExtensionMember
public abstract class Rationale extends Object
A predicate that we can justify by a rule if needed.
